_comment: PC App bundle (supabase_client / HTTPS-443) — for environments that CANNOT egress 5432 (the claude.ai chat sandbox). NOT privileged: signs in as PC's A1 user over PostgREST, so RLS applies (scoped to PC's profile). For DELETE/DDL/cross-profile 'god mode' use the direct_role pc_unrestricted bundle from Cowork/your Mac, where 5432 is reachable. Build: python scripts/package_skill.py <ver> --person config/pc_app.config.example.json --out healthspan-PC-APP-<ver>.skill
_secret_note: auth_email / auth_password / supabase_anon_key are read AT BUILD TIME from config/pc_app.secret.txt (gitignored), one per line as `auth_email=…`, `auth_password=…`, `supabase_anon_key=…`. VERIFIED working values: auth_email=pc.skill@chitalkar.com (the A1 user in config/pc_skill.secret.txt, RLS-scoped to PC), auth_password = the Password line of config/pc_skill.secret.txt, supabase_anon_key = SUPABASE_ANON_KEY from .env (the legacy eyJ… JWT — both tested HTTP 200).
